{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Badari trader
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] bartered for his [[sword]] from a [[Badari trader]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
